zh.lifeSummary: 當Affra Cornwallis於1511年6月27日出生在英國素福爾可布洛時，她的父親William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath51歲，母親Elizabeth Stanford46歲。她於大約1525年7月20日與Sir Anthony Aucher在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年5月12日在英國英格蘭肯特享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Affra Cornwallis于1511年6月27日出生在英国素福爾可布洛时，她的父亲William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath51岁，母亲Elizabeth Stanford46岁。她于大约1525年7月20日与Sir Anthony Aucher在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年5月12日在英国英格兰肯特享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwallis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: regional name for someone from Cornwall, a Normanized form of Middle English Cornwalish. Compare Cornwall .

variants.name: Cornwall
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornish
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Affra Cornwallis was born on 27 June 1511, in Brome, Suffolk, England, her father, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, was 51 and her mother, Elizabeth Stanford, was 46. She married Sir Anthony Aucher about 20 July 1525, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 May 1560, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Affra Cornwallis est née le 27 juin 1511, à Brome, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stanford, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Anthony Aucher environ 20 juillet 1525, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1560, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Affra Cornwallis am 27. Juni 1511 in Brome, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath 51 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Stanford 46. Sie hat um 20. Juli 1525 in England Sir Anthony Aucher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1560 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Affra Cornwallis è nata il il 27 giugno 1511 nel Brome, Suffolk, England, sua padre, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Stanford, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Sir Anthony Aucher circa 20 luglio 1525, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 maggio 1560, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Affra Cornwallisが1511年6月27日にイギリススフォルクブロメで生まれた時，父William Cornwallis Knight of the Bathは51歳，母Elizabeth Stanfordは46歳であった。約1525年7月20日にイギリスでSir Anthony Aucherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年5月12日にイギリスイギリスケントで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Affra Cornwallis(이)가 1511년 6월 27일 영국 수폴크 브롬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stanford(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 대략 1525년 7월 20일 영국에서 Sir Anthony Aucher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.27 June 1511–12 May 1560: 27 de junho de 1511–12 de maio de 1560
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Affra Cornwallis nasceu em 27 de junho de 1511, em Brome, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stanford, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Anthony Aucher aproximadamente 20 de julho de 1525, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1560, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Affra Cornwallis родилась 27 июня 1511 г. в местности бром, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stanford, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Anthony Aucher около 20 июля 1525 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 мая 1560 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.27 June 1511–12 May 1560: 27 de junio de 1511–12 de mayo de 1560
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Affra Cornwallis nació el 27 de junio de 1511, en Brome, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stanford, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Sir Anthony Aucher aproximadamente 20 de julio de 1525, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1560, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
